choose a throne:

Event: The Abyssal Adventure
Event Date: 13/03/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: E71
Sorrow of the Deep

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, the unit covers 3 random enemy units in jelly for 3 sec. The targets are unable to move or attack, and take 20% /more 21% / 22% / 23% / 25% / 27% / 30% damage, for 3 sec. When the ability wears off, the jelly explodes and sticks to 2 nearest enemy units for 3 sec. Their attack speed is reduced by 20% / 21% / 22% / 23% / 25% / 27% / 30%, and they have a 20% / 21% / 22% / 23% / 25% / 27% / 30% chance to miss their target on attack.

Enhancement: 2
3000 Damage from the gems
Once in a while, the unit covers 3 random enemy units in jelly for 3 sec. The targets are unable to move or attack, and take 25% / 26% / 27% / 28% / 30% / 32% / 35% more damage, for 3 sec. When the ability wears off, the jelly explodes and sticks to 2 nearest enemy units for 3 sec. Their attack speed is reduced by 30% / 31% / 32% / 33% / 35% / 37% / 40%, and they have a 30% / 31% / 32% / 33% / 35% / 37% / 40% chance to miss their target on attack. The unit also gains a shield that blocks 3 attacks of any type. The shield exists up to 4 sec. While the shield is active, the unit restores 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 15% / 17% / 20% health every second.

Enhancement: 3
6000 Damage from the gems
Once in a while, the unit covers 3 random enemy units in jelly for 4 sec. The targets are unable to move or attack, and take 30% / 31% / 32% / 33% / 35% / 37% / 40% more damage, for 4 sec. When the ability wears off, the jelly explodes and sticks to 2 nearest enemy units for 4 sec. Their attack speed is reduced by 40% / 41% / 42% / 43% / 45% / 47% / 50%, and they have a 40% / 41% / 42% / 43% / 45% / 47% / 50% chance to miss their target on attack. The unit also gains a shield that blocks 4 attacks of any type. The shield exists up to 5 sec. While the shield is active, the unit restores 15% / 16% / 17% / 18% / 20% / 22% / 25% health every second. When the shield wears off, or is removed, the unit restores 15% / 16% / 17% / 18% / 20% / 22% / 25% health and goes into a frenzy. Their size increases, and all their stats are increased by 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 15% / 17% / 25% for 4 sec.

Requirements:

Event: The Abyssal Adventure

Event date: 13/03/2026

Sage bot code: E71

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 10 secs
